parsed.production_notes: The video features a split-screen layout. The top half is an AI-generated animated avatar with stylized, cartoonish features and slightly unnatural lip-syncing. The bottom half is a human-recorded video of a man lying in bed.

characters.appearance: Animated female character with large green eyes, fair skin, and wavy red hair. She has a stylized, cartoonish look.
characters.wardrobe: White t-shirt, small gold hoop earrings with a crescent moon charm.

characters.appearance: Young adult male with dark hair, a short beard, and a mustache. He has a relaxed, casual appearance.
characters.demeanor: Sleepy, relaxed, but engaged in the conversation.

scenes.setting: Top: A stylized room with a mirror and lights. Bottom: A bedroom, with the man lying on a bed with patterned pillows.

panels.panel_visual_description: Character A, an animated woman with red hair, is shown in a close-up shot. She rests her chin on her hand, looking directly at the camera with a friendly expression. The background is slightly blurred, showing what appears to be a vanity mirror with round lights.

Character B, a young man with a beard, is lying in bed. His head rests on a pillow with a blue and white geometric pattern, and another pillow with a brown and white floral pattern is visible behind him. He is looking up towards the camera, appearing relaxed and slightly sleepy.

scenes.visual_description: The screen is split horizontally. The top half shows an animated female avatar (Character A) acting as a language tutor. The bottom half shows a real man (Character B) lying in bed, participating in the lesson. Text overlays appear in the center of the screen, displaying the dialogue in Spanish. A banner with Spanish flags is visible at the top of the screen.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: ¿Hablas español? [Do you speak Spanish?]
Character B says: Sí, yo conozco español. [Yes, I know Spanish.]
Character A says: Técnicamente es correcto, pero los hablantes nativos simplemente dicen, hablo español. [Technically it's correct, but native speakers simply say, I speak Spanish.]
Character B says: Hablo español. [I speak Spanish.]
Character A says: ¿Cuántos años tienes? [How old are you?]
Character B says: Soy veinticuatro. [I am twenty-four.]
Character A says: Quieres decir, tengo veinticuatro años. [You mean, I am twenty-four years old.]
Character B says: Tengo veinticuatro años. [I am twenty-four years old.]
Character A says: ¿Cómo te llamas? [What is your name?]
Character B says: Mi nombre es Gustavo. [My name is Gustavo.]
Character A says: Los hablantes nativos normalmente dicen, me llamo Gustavo. [Native speakers normally say, my name is Gustavo.]
Character B says: Me llamo Gustavo. [My name is Gustavo.]
Character A says: Bien hecho. [Well done.]
Character B says: Gracias, ¿pero quién eres? [Thank you, but who are you?]
Character A says: Soy un tutor de IA en Praktika. Podemos hablar así todos los días para aprender español. [I am an AI tutor on Praktika. We can talk like this every day to learn Spanish.]
Character B says: Pero mi español es A1. No puedo hablar. [But my Spanish is A1. I can't speak.]
Character A says: No te preocupes. Puedo enseñarte en tu lengua materna mientras aprendes español. [Don't worry. I can teach you in your native language while you learn Spanish.]
Character B says: ¿Conoces mi idioma? [Do you know my language?]
Character A says: Claro, soy una IA. [Of course, I am an AI.]
Character B says: Voy a descargar esta aplicación. [I am going to download this app.]

scenes.visual_description: A white screen displays the app's logo, a purple square with a white stylized 'P' inside. Below the logo is the app name 'praktika.ai' in purple text. At the bottom are two black buttons: 'GET IT ON Google Play' and 'Available on the App Store'.
